## Summary

Describe the fix-pass scope and why it runs outside the active phase stream.

## Fix Scope

- [ ] Clearly bounded fix scope
- [ ] No hidden feature work mixed in
- [ ] Any deferred follow-up listed

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo xtask audit` passed, or reason it was not run
- [ ] Targeted validation evidence linked
- [ ] Documentation updated, or reason not needed

## Notes

- Why deferring this fix would be risky:
- Integration impact on active phase PR:

Before requesting review:

- [ ] Related fix issue linked in PR sidebar (`Development`)
- [ ] Fix issue closed, or will be closed before merge
- [ ] Milestone and labels are set in GitHub metadata when applicable
